{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Midnight Fang
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Helethshan]] is of the blood of the [[Midnight Fang]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13">''Dreadgod'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|“I am Helethshan, blood of the Midnight Fang, and I will accept you into my service.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
